title: Indifferent
description: A challenge mod that redacts all textures, sounds, and text.
body: # Indifferent A challenge mod that redacts (blanks out) all **textures, sounds, and text** from Minecraft. All textures are bright gray, all sounds have been replaced with the stone sound, and all text is now "XXXXX". Even particles, fog, the sun/moon, weather, and health/hunger are obfuscated! You'll need to rely on stacking items, checking crafting recipes, and special behaviors to figure out what is what. Can you beat the game with these restrictions? ### Toggle? The effects of the mod can be fully toggled on/off in the ModMenu configs, if you'd like to see your world after beating the challenge! ### F3 Note: F3 info that may help you cheat, such as advanced tooltips, looking-at-block, and biome are also disabled! You're welcome :) ### Source & Issues Check out the source code, and report any issues, on Github: https://github.com/crystaltine/indifferent ### Previews
